title: Fishing opportunities for British fishing boats: determinations published in 2025
body: "Fishing opportunities for British fishing boats for certain fish stocks and groups of fish stocks.  The Secretary of State makes these determinations under section 23 of the Fisheries Act 2020. They have had regard to the obligations of the United Kingdom under international law, including the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea.  You can also read:   a summary of the determinations setting out current fishing opportunities older determinations of fishing opportunities  "
